footer.tagline:
Authentic coastal experiences
from Bergen, Norway

home.title: Kystopplevelser — Authentic Coastal Experiences from Bergen
home.description: Kystopplevelser offers authentic experiences from Bergen: RIB tours on the fjord, boat rental, and floating sauna by the sea. Experience the coast from a different angle.
home.heroTitle: RIB tour in Bergen's stunning archipelago
home.heroSubtitle: We take you out on the ocean. Close to Bergen, far from the everyday.
home.servicesSubtitle: Choose the experience that suits you, or combine them for an unforgettable day at sea.
home.ribDesc: Certified skippers take you out into the archipelago for an unforgettable experience on the water. We pick you up wherever suits you best along the coast.
home.boatDesc: Rent a simple motorboat for fishing or a relaxed coastal trip. Up to 8 people. Boat operator's licence required.
home.saunaDesc: Floating sauna with panoramic sea views. Private sauna, sauna cruise, or drop-in. Available all year round.
home.touristBody: Experience Bergen and the fjords from the seaside. An experience you won't find in any travel guide. We make sure your visit is unforgettable.
home.corporateBody: Strengthen your team with unforgettable ocean experiences. We offer tailored corporate packages with activities that create strong bonds and great memories.
home.groupBody: From birthdays and friend groups to family gatherings. We welcome groups of all sizes and tailor the experience to your wishes.
home.featureRibBody: There is no better way to experience the coast from the seaside. Our certified skippers take you out into the archipelago for an unforgettable experience. We pick you up wherever suits you best along the coast.
home.featureRibBullet2: Safety equipment and dry suit included
home.featureSaunaBody: Our floating sauna is an oasis of calm and warmth, with panoramic sea views. Alternate between the intense heat and the refreshing plunge into the sea. Private sauna, sauna cruise, or drop-in. Three formats to choose from.
home.testimonial1Text: We booked the RIB tour on a whim on our last evening in Bergen, and it was absolutely the highlight of the entire trip. Our guide Magnus knew everything about the fjord: the stories, the birds, the hidden coves. We got to see the sunset from the water and felt completely alone in the beautiful landscape. I recommend this to everyone visiting Bergen. Unforgettable!
home.testimonial2Text: We used Kystopplevelser for our company party and everyone was thrilled. Perfect mix of RIB tour and sauna. Will definitely book again next year!
home.testimonial3Text: The sauna in winter was magical. Steam, starry sky, and cold sea. Absolutely incredible. It became a tradition for us every year.
home.ctaBody: Book your next experience today. We respond within 24 hours and help you tailor the perfect trip.

rib.title: RIB Tour Bergen — Experience the Coast in the Archipelago | Kystopplevelser
rib.description: Book a RIB tour in the archipelago around Bergen. Certified skippers, all safety equipment included. We pick you up wherever suits you best along the coast.
rib.heroSubtitle: Certified skippers take you out into the archipelago for an unforgettable experience on the water. Safe, authentic, and right outside Bergen.
rib.introTitle: Adrenaline-filled nature experience on the fjord
rib.introP1: There is something truly unique about experiencing the coast from the seaside. The archipelago outside Bergen stretches from narrow sounds and sheltered bays out towards the open sea, framed by green islets and dramatic mountains. A RIB tour gives you a perspective no city walk or sightseeing bus can offer. Close to the water, surrounded by real nature.
rib.introP2: We offer guided RIB tours departing from wherever you wish: Bergen city centre, Sotra, Flesland, or any other agreed location along the coast. Tours are led by certified skippers and experienced guides with deep local knowledge of the fjord, history, and wildlife along the route.
rib.introP3: Whether you're traveling as a couple, family, or corporate group, we adapt the tour to your group. Need more space? We add boats. All tours include a safety briefing, equipment, and skipper. You don't need any experience at sea to join.
rib.benefit1Body: Our skippers are Bergen locals who know the fjord like their own backyard, from hidden coves and historic lighthouses to the best viewpoints you'll never find on a map.
rib.benefit2Body: Our skippers have extensive experience and hold all the certificates and safety courses required. A life jacket and warm dry suit protecting against wind and weather are included.
rib.benefit3Body: The RIB tour is equally suitable for friend groups, corporate events, and families. Larger groups? We add boats. No upper limit.
rib.benefit4Body: We can meet you anywhere along the coast, as long as there are suitable quay conditions. We adapt both meeting time and departure point to your schedule.
rib.benefit5Body: Guests from all over the world describe the RIB tour as the highlight of their Bergen visit. The combination of speed, fresh air, and magnificent nature creates moments you remember long after you've gone home.
rib.benefit6Body: Dry suit, life jacket, and goggles providing good protection against water and cold are included. A hat, gloves, and sturdy footwear are recommended in cold weather.
rib.pricingSubtitle: Two departure points, same amazing experience. Choose what works best for your group.
rib.pricing1Title: RIB Tour from Bergen City Centre
rib.pricing1Note: Only NOK 1,158 per person at full capacity (12 ppl)
rib.pricing2Note: Only NOK 825 per person at full capacity (12 ppl)
rib.pricingFootnote: All prices are excl. VAT. Businesses can be invoiced. Contact us for group prices for more than one tour.
rib.includedSubtitle: You show up, we take care of the rest. Here's what's included in the price.
rib.included2: Exciting routes through beautiful coastal areas
rib.included3: A unique experience of the coastal landscape from the water
rib.ctaBody: We respond within 24 hours and help you find the perfect departure time. Depart from wherever you wish, and we adapt to your group.
rib.partnersSubtitle: With great partners throughout the Bergen region, we can put together a package that delivers a complete experience. Perfect for corporate trips, conferences, friend groups, or stag/hen parties.
rib.partner1Desc: Outstanding food and accommodation in beautiful surroundings on Sotra. How about a great meal after the RIB tour, or a visit to the spa? Just 40 minutes from Bergen city centre by RIB.
rib.partner2Desc: In partnership with Panorama Hotel, we offer trips to the lighthouse on the outermost islet in the sea gap west of Bergen. Guided tour, local food and beer. Overnight stays at the lighthouse are also possible.
rib.partner3Desc: At the far end of Sotra lies the historic trading post of Glesvær. We take you by sea from Bergen or pick you up by RIB for food and drinks in cosy surroundings.
rib.partner4Desc: A few nautical miles south of Bergen, tucked into the sheltered harbour of Austevoll. Enjoy exquisite dishes from the Johannessen family's master kitchen. We'll bring you there by RIB.
rib.partner5Desc: On idyllic Tysnes south of Bergen, in beautiful surroundings with sea views to the west and mountain scenery to the east. Wonderful local food and warm hospitality. Just 50–60 min by RIB from Bergen.
rib.partner6Desc: Just beyond Panorama Hotel, in Spildepollen. Professional team building and activities for corporate and private groups. Start with a RIB tour and continue with team building and great food in the lavvo.
rib.partner7Desc: On the islet just outside Bjorøy, Cornelius serves outstanding seafood year-round. A natural and unforgettable stop along the RIB route.
rib.partner8Desc: Based in Os, Fjordfolk are passionate event organisers with extensive experience in activities, celebrations, and entertainment for corporate and private groups. We are proud to call them a partner.
rib.faqTitle: What you might wonder about the RIB tour
rib.faqSubtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact us directly.
rib.faq1Question: What happens if the weather is bad?
rib.faq1Answer: If we have to cancel due to bad weather, you of course get a full refund, or we agree on a new time.
rib.faq2Answer: On RIB tours we provide a dry suit, life jacket and goggles. All safety equipment and a walkthrough are included. A hat, gloves and sturdy footwear are recommended in cold weather.
rib.faq3Answer: We pick you up wherever suits you best: Bergen city centre, Sotra, Flesland or another agreed location along the coast, as long as there are suitable quay conditions.
rib.faq4Answer: Up to 12 people per boat. For larger groups we add more boats. There is no upper limit.
rib.faq5Answer: Yes, the RIB tour is suitable for children from age 8. We adjust speed and route when children are on board.

booking.metaDescription: Book a coastal experience from Bergen: RIB tour, boat rental and sauna/floating sauna. We respond within 24 hours.
booking.heading: Ready for an experience?
booking.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll help you plan the perfect experience.
booking.experienceRibBergen: RIB Tour from Bergen City Centre
booking.placeholderMessage: Tell us about any special requests, dietary requirements or questions...
booking.labelSource: How did you hear about us?
booking.gdprText: I agree to the privacy policy and consent to Kystopplevelser contacting me regarding my enquiry.
booking.successMessage: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
booking.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
booking.errorExperienceRequired: Please select at least one experience.
booking.errorGuestsRequired: Please enter the number of people (minimum 1).
booking.errorGdprRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to send your enquiry.
booking.sidebarSeasonalText: The sauna is available all year, including winter months. RIB tours and boat rental operate primarily April–October. Contact us for special winter bookings.
booking.faqSubtitle: Questions grouped by service. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to contact us directly.
booking.faq1Question: What happens if the weather is bad?
booking.faq1Answer: If we have to cancel due to bad weather, you of course get a full refund, or we agree on a new time.
booking.faq2Answer: We recommend warm, comfortable layers and a windproof jacket. Even in summer it can feel brisk out on the fjord. We can lend life jackets and rain gear. For the sauna, bring a swimsuit and towel (we can also provide towels).
booking.faq3Question: Do I need a boat operator's licence?
booking.faq3Answer: A boat operator's licence is required to rent a boat with an engine over 25 hp. We provide a walkthrough of the boat and safety equipment before departure. For RIB tours and sauna, no licence is needed. We have our own certified skippers.
booking.faq4Answer: Yes! The sauna is suitable for all ages and is a family-friendly activity we love to arrange for families. RIB tours are suitable for children from age 8. Boat rental is open to the whole family, and we tailor the experience to your group.
booking.faq5Answer: We offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before the agreed time. Cancellations within 48 hours incur a 50% charge. If we cancel due to weather, you receive a full refund or a new time.
booking.faq6Answer: Yes! For groups of 8 or more and corporate clients we offer tailored packages and discounts. Contact us directly for a quote suited to your group. We love organising special experiences.
booking.faq7Answer: Yes! On RIB tours we provide a dry suit, life jacket and goggles. On boat rentals we lend you a life jacket. Safety equipment and a walkthrough are always included.
booking.faq8Question: How far is it from Bergen city centre?
booking.faq8Answer: Our address is Austefjordsvegen 165, 5379 Steinsland, approx. 45 min drive from Bergen city centre via E39 and the Sotra Bridge. We're happy to pick you up wherever suits you best along the coast: Bergen, Sotra, Flesland or another agreed location.
booking.ctaText: Still not sure? Call us or send an email. We're happy to help you choose the right experience.

gallery.metaDescription: See photos and video from Kystopplevelser's activities: RIB tours, boat rental, sauna and nature experiences from Bergen.
gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos from RIB tours, boat rental, sauna and the beautiful nature around Bergen.
gallery.galleryCaption8: Guided RIB tour in the archipelago
gallery.videoSubtitle: Get a glimpse of what awaits you out on the fjord. Our film shows a typical day at Kystopplevelser, from RIB tours at sunrise to calm evenings in the sauna.
gallery.ctaEyebrow: See it with your own eyes
gallery.ctaBody: Photos say more than a thousand words, but the real experience is even better. Book today and create your own memories from the fjord.

boat.title: Boat Rental Bergen — Explore the Coast and Try Your Fishing Luck | Kystopplevelser
boat.description: Rent an Øien motorboat at Panorama Hotel & Resort on Sotra. Great fishing experiences by Marstein Lighthouse, or relaxed trips to Glesvær and other coves along the coast.
boat.heroTitle: Explore the coast and try your fishing luck
boat.heroSubtitle: Rent an Øien motorboat at Panorama Hotel & Resort. Great fishing experiences out at sea, or relaxed trips into sheltered coves and small towns along the coast.
boat.introTitle: Your own day on the water
boat.introP1: Out here you can enjoy great fishing experiences at sea by Marstein Lighthouse. Others prefer relaxed trips into coves and small towns. How about coffee and ice cream on the waterfront at Glesvær kafé?
boat.introP2: We rent out 7 Øien motorboats. The boats have an engine and are simple to use. They are docked at Panorama Hotel & Resort. Before renting you receive an introduction to handling the boat. The renter must present a boat operator's licence and sign a declaration at rental (if you were born before 1980, a licence is not required).
boat.introP3: Booking, pricing and availability are handled by Panorama Hotel & Resort. Contact them directly for a quote and reservation.
boat.audienceSubtitle: Boat rental is the perfect setting for many different occasions and experiences.
boat.benefit1Body: Take the boat out towards Marstein Lighthouse and try your fishing luck. These waters are known for great fishing, and it's a short ride from the dock at Panorama to the best fishing spots.
boat.benefit2Body: Relaxed trips to coves and small towns along the coast. Stop by Glesvær for coffee and ice cream on the waterfront, or find your own favourite spot.
boat.benefit3Body: The Øien boats are easy to handle and well suited for families and groups of friends. Bring food and drinks, find a sheltered cove and enjoy a day on the water.
boat.benefit4Body: The boats are docked at Panorama Hotel & Resort on Sotra. Feel free to combine boat rental with an overnight stay and great food at the hotel.
boat.benefit5Body: You don't need a lot of experience to rent an Øien. The boats have an engine and are easy to manoeuvre. Before rental you receive an introduction to handling the boat.
boat.benefit6Body: The renter must present a boat operator's licence and sign a declaration at rental. If you were born before 1980, a licence is not required.
boat.included2: Life jackets and necessary safety equipment
boat.included3: Introduction to handling the boat before departure
boat.included4: Tips on good fishing spots and destinations along the coast
boat.includedFootnote: The boats are docked at Panorama Hotel & Resort on Sotra.
boat.contactBody: Boat rental is handled by Panorama Hotel & Resort on Sotra. Send an email or call them directly for pricing, availability and reservation.
boat.ctaTitle: Book your boat rental at Panorama Hotel
boat.ctaBody: Booking, pricing and availability are handled directly by Panorama Hotel & Resort. Contact them for a quote and reservation.
boat.faqSubtitle: Boat rental is operated by our partner Panorama Hotel & Resort.
boat.faq1Answer: Booking is handled by Panorama Hotel & Resort. Email booking@panoramahotell.no or call +47 56 31 90 00.
boat.faq2Answer: Pricing depends on duration, time and season. Contact Panorama Hotel & Resort for a tailored quote.
boat.faq3Question: Do I need a boat operator's licence?
boat.faq3Answer: Yes, a boat operator's licence is required for boats with an engine over 25 hp. You'll receive a walkthrough of the boat via video before departure.
boat.faq4Answer: Availability varies by season. Check directly with Panorama Hotel & Resort for current times and booking options.
boat.faq5Question: Where do I pick up the boat?
boat.faq5Answer: Boat rental is based at Panorama Hotel & Resort on Sotra. Pick-up and drop-off details are arranged directly with them at booking.

sauna.title: Sauna by the Sea — Havblikk Fjordsauna in Øygarden | Kystopplevelser
sauna.description: Floating sauna by Havgapet in Øygarden, approx. 45 min from Bergen. Private sauna, sauna cruise or drop-in. Booking via Havblikk Fjordsauna.
sauna.heroSubtitle: Our floating sauna lies by Havgapet in Øygarden. Here the calm of the sea wraps around every breath. Available all year round.
sauna.introTitle: Sauna by the sea in Øygarden
sauna.introP1: There is something deeply relaxing about sitting in a hot sauna while looking out over the sea. The Nordic sauna tradition is about more than wellness. It's a pause from everyday life, a sense of community with those you're with, and a deep connection to the nature around you.
sauna.introP2: The sauna is located by Havgapet in Øygarden, approx. 45 min from Bergen city centre. Alternate between the intense indoor warmth (80–90°C) and the refreshing dip into the sea outside. We offer three formats: private sauna, sauna cruise, and drop-in, so you can find what fits your group best.
sauna.introP3: Available all year. In winter the combination of steam and cold sea is close to magical. In summer you get the calm light of the midnight sun over the horizon.
sauna.offersSubtitle: From private sauna to drop-in and sauna cruise. There's a format for any occasion.
sauna.card1Desc: A private sauna means you and your group have it all to yourselves. Perfect for friends, hen parties or team building.
sauna.card2Desc: Combine warmth and sightseeing. We cruise gently through the archipelago while you enjoy the heat inside, and you can hop into the sea straight from the boat.
sauna.card3Desc: Book a single spot alone or with a friend and meet other friendly sauna enthusiasts. A simple and affordable way to enjoy a good sauna session.
sauna.offersFootnote: Booking, prices and availability are handled by Havblikk Fjordsauna.
sauna.benefit1Body: The sauna is available twelve months a year. Winter bathing with steam rising towards the starry sky is an experience hard to describe, and impossible to forget.
sauna.benefit2Body: A private sauna means you and your friends get it all to yourselves. No strangers, no sharing. Perfect for celebrations, hen parties or an extra special evening.
sauna.benefit3Body: The sauna is both wood-fired and electric. The traditional wood stove gives an authentic Scandinavian sauna experience with dry, clean heat and characteristic soft steam. The electric heater ensures an even temperature throughout the session.
sauna.included1: Access to the sea for cold water swimming
sauna.ctaTitle: Book your sauna trip with Havblikk
sauna.ctaBody: Booking, prices and availability are handled directly by Havblikk Fjordsauna. Click below to go to their booking page.
sauna.faqSubtitle: The sauna is operated by our partner Havblikk Fjordsauna.
sauna.faq1Answer: All bookings are made directly with Havblikk Fjordsauna at havblikkfjordsauna.no.
sauna.faq2Answer: Prices are maintained by Havblikk Fjordsauna. See current prices and packages at havblikkfjordsauna.no.
sauna.faq3Answer: The sauna is located by Havgapet in Øygarden, approx. 45 min from Bergen city centre. Address: Austefjordsvegen 165, 5379 Steinsland.
sauna.faq4Question: Is the sauna open all year?
sauna.faq4Answer: Yes, the sauna is available twelve months a year. Check current availability with Havblikk Fjordsauna.
sauna.faq5Answer: Bring a swimsuit and a towel. The wood-fired stove is pre-heated on arrival, and you have access to the sea for cold water swimming.

aboutPage.title: About Us — Kystopplevelser Bergen
aboutPage.description: Meet the people behind Kystopplevelser in Bergen. We are driven by a passion for the sea and a desire to share the beauty of the Norwegian coast with everyone.
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Safety first, and great experiences along the coast. Our certified skippers know the waters well, and make sure you get an experience to remember.
aboutPage.storyTitle: Based on Sotra, with experiences along the entire coast
aboutPage.storyP1: We run RIB tours across the whole of Hordaland and beyond, but our base is on the south side of Sotra, just outside Bergen, at Panorama Hotel & Resort. From here it is a short trip to the open sea, Austevoll and the fjords south and west of Bergen, some of the most beautiful coastal areas along the entire Norwegian west coast.
aboutPage.storyP2: If you would like to be picked up in Bergen city centre, at Flesland quay or at any other location along the coast, we come to you. Flexibility is important to us, and we always tailor the experience to your needs and wishes. Whether it is a corporate outing departing from Bryggen or a private tour from a local pier, we make it happen.
aboutPage.storyP3: Our partner Panorama Hotel & Resort offers excellent food and accommodation for those who want to extend the experience. Combine a day on the water with a stay by the fjord. Perfect for corporate events, birthdays or a proper weekend trip with friends and family.
aboutPage.storyP4: Safety always comes first. Our skippers are certified and have extensive experience in these waters, and all equipment is well maintained. Within those safe boundaries, we put together an experience you'll remember, whether it's a RIB tour in the archipelago, a day of fishing or an evening in the sauna.
aboutPage.storyQuote: "The sea does something to people. It puts everything in perspective, and that is exactly what we want for you."
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: These three principles are the foundation of everything we do out on the water.
aboutPage.value1Body: Safety is never a compromise for us. All our equipment is certified and regularly inspected. Every skipper holds valid maritime and lifesaving certificates. You can relax. We look after you.
aboutPage.value2Body: We are Bergeners through and through. We know every cove, every reef and all the hidden gems along the coast. Our local expertise means you discover places most visitors never find on their own.
aboutPage.value3Body: We love the sea and want to protect it. We use eco-friendly fuel wherever possible, maintain strict rules against waste in the fjord, and support local initiatives to preserve the coastal ecosystem for future generations.
aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Three people with a shared goal: to give you the best experience on the water.
aboutPage.team1Tagline: "Spent more time on the water than on land"
aboutPage.team2Tagline: "Knows every cove and current along the coast"
aboutPage.team3Tagline: "Makes sure everything is ready when you arrive"
aboutPage.locationSubtitle: We are based in Øygarden municipality in Vestland, right in the beautiful coastal landscape outside Bergen.
aboutPage.locationDirections: Approx. 45 min drive from Bergen city centre via E39 and the Sotra Bridge. Follow signs towards Øygarden/Steinsland.
aboutPage.locationParking: Free parking available on site. Moorings available for those arriving by boat.
aboutPage.safetyText: All our activities are conducted to the highest safety standards in accordance with Norwegian and international requirements. Every vessel undergoes regular technical inspection, and all safety equipment is always up to date and on board. Your safety is our absolute highest priority on the water.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Get to know us out on the water
aboutPage.ctaBody: The best way to meet our team is out on the fjord. Book an experience and we will show you Bergen the way we see it.

experiences.title: Services — Kystopplevelser Bergen
experiences.description: Explore all coastal experiences from Bergen: RIB tour on the fjord, boat rental and sauna by the sea. See all offers and book today.
experiences.heroSubtitle: Three unique ways to experience the Norwegian coast, from experiences in the archipelago to calm and wellness.
experiences.hubSubtitle: Click on a service to read more, see prices and book.
experiences.ribDesc: Guided RIB tours in the archipelago around Bergen. Certified skippers, all safety equipment included. We pick you up wherever suits you best.
experiences.boatDesc: Rent a simple motorboat for fishing or a relaxed coastal trip. Up to 8 people. Boat operator's licence required. Price on request.
experiences.saunaDesc: Private bath, sauna cruise and drop-in. Floating sauna with sea views, available all year. Booking via Havblikk Fjordsauna.
experiences.teambuildingBody: We create tailored packages for companies who want to give their employees an unforgettable day at sea. Combine a RIB tour with sauna for a full-day experience that strengthens team spirit and creates lasting memories. Adapted to your group in size, theme and budget.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy and Terms — Kystopplevelser Bergen
privacy.description: Privacy policy and payment terms for Kystopplevelser AS in Bergen.
privacy.section1Text: Kystopplevelser AS (996859770) protects your privacy. In this privacy policy, we inform you about how we handle your personal data in connection with your visit to our websites or when you register an account through any of our websites. We may make changes to our privacy policy to reflect changes in our business, on our websites or services, or applicable law. The latest version of the privacy policy is always available here on the website.
privacy.section2Text: You have the right at any time to withdraw or request access to your personal data. Only persons with necessary work tasks will have the ability to access details in order to handle agreements and enquiries.
privacy.section3Title: 3. Who is responsible for the personal data we collect?
privacy.section3Text: Kystopplevelser AS is responsible for ensuring that your personal data is processed in accordance with laws and regulations. We implement technical, legal and organisational security measures to protect your personal data from being manipulated, lost or destroyed, or from being accessed by unauthorised persons.
privacy.section4Title: 4. How do we collect personal data?
privacy.section4Text: In order to provide you with a complete offer, we will ask for:
privacy.section4Text2: We collect personal data through Vipps and through user input. This information is not shared with others and is only used for its necessary purpose of administering, supporting and carrying out agreements between the service provider and the customer.
privacy.section4Vipps: Vipps terms can be read here: vipps.no/vilkar/vilkar-privat
privacy.section5Text: The seller is Kystopplevelser AS, org. no. 996859770, and is hereinafter referred to as the seller. The buyer is the consumer who places the order, and is hereinafter referred to as the buyer.
privacy.section6Text1: Your membership gives access to Kystopplevelser AS's facilities and services. You will have access from the moment of purchase. The subscription has no commitment period and can be cancelled at any time either by contacting Kystopplevelser AS at post@kyst-opplevelser.no or by cancelling the subscription in Vipps under "Manage subscription".
privacy.section6Text2: After payment, you will have access for the full month regardless of when in the month you cancel. You have a 14-day right of withdrawal. Contact us at post@kyst-opplevelser.no for a refund if you are not satisfied. If you are unable to cancel the subscription yourself, you can contact us at post@kyst-opplevelser.no for an immediate cancellation.
privacy.section7Text: When booking, you gain access to the location or activity at the time of booking. If cancelled close to the booking time, the booking will not be automatically refunded. Payment is made when the booking is placed and is considered delivered when the visit begins. You may request a refund or adjustment if you have made an incorrect booking, as long as it is done in time before the visit was due to start.
privacy.disputeText: Complaints should be directed to the seller within a reasonable time. The parties shall attempt to resolve any disputes amicably. If this is not successful, the buyer may contact the Norwegian Consumer Council for mediation. The Consumer Council is available by phone at 23 400 500 or at www.forbrukerradet.no.
privacy.contactText: If you have further questions about Kystopplevelser's payment terms or other enquiries, you can contact the company.
